content.en:
No one knew that the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor instructed Ye Tian to break the boundaries and try to unify the spirit and spirit.

The other Dao Ancestors didn't know, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor wouldn't say it, and Ye Tian wouldn't be stupid enough to tell the others.

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch and the others only knew that Ye Tian had been cursed, but they didn't understand the curse of the evil demon ban, and Ye Tian would not be stupid enough to say that he was cursed and could not be promoted to the True Spirit Realm.

Therefore, the other Heavenly Monarchs only regarded Ye Tian as a rare curse, but it was definitely difficult for a Dao Ancestor, so they didn't take it seriously.

But with the fall of Zero, the top forces of the Great Universe were shocked, and the Void Heaven Temple also became the number one force in the current Great Universe.

Ye Tian is also known as the First Heavenly Monarch of the Great Universe, the first powerhouse, and even other half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses have recognized Ye Tian's strength.

Of course.

Now the half-step True Spirit Realm cultivation of the Great Universe is the highest, and it is only fused fifty percent, if the true spirit and the physical body are fused ninety, the strength can far exceed the fifty percent fusion.

At that time, these half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses were not necessarily weaker than Ye Tian.

In addition, the rules of the great universe began to loosen, and the shackles of promoting to the True Spirit Realm gradually disappeared, and perhaps tens of millions of years later, the Great Universe would give birth to a strong person in the True Spirit Realm.

At that time, Ye Tianruo was still a Heavenly Monarch, but it would be difficult to suppress other powerhouses.

......

Ye Tian didn't care about the discussion of the outside world, and he no longer paid attention to things, except for letting Yanglong Tianjun collect some resources, he started retreat and cultivation with all his might.

The road to breaking boundaries and completing the unity of essence and spirit must be long, but he must now complete the first step and raise his spirit and spirit to the limit.

Ye Tian's limit far surpassed that of others, so the resources consumed were naturally many, many.

Fortunately, Ye Tian had obtained the Star Crystal before, which was equivalent to 3.1 billion Void Heaven Points, and in the last few million years, he had only consumed a few hundred million points, and there were still a lot of points left.

As a result, Ye Tian spent countless resources at all costs, and finally after five million years, he raised his physical body, chaotic divine power, and divine soul to the current limit, that is, the essence and divine limit level.

At this point, there is no way to advance in cultivation, except for advancing to the half-step True Spirit Realm, there is no way to improve cultivation.

Although Ye Tian knew that he had fallen under the spell of the demon's ban, he still wanted to try to condense the true spirit.

But soon, his attempt failed.

He couldn't condense the true spirit at all, the curse of the demon ban completely imprisoned his cultivation, and there was no way for him to condense the half-step true spirit, and forcibly condensing it would be a heavy blow.

After trying a few times, there was really no way to break through, Ye Tian could only choose the path of unity of spirit and spirit.

"The second step is to create the three Origin Divine Powers!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Creating the Origin Divine Power is what the True Ancestors do, he is only at the Heavenly Monarch level, how difficult it is to create the Origin Divine Power, it is a hundred times more difficult!

Fortunately, he had the Origin Talent, and it was a full Origin Talent, otherwise, he would not be qualified to create the Origin Divine Power related to the Spirit Qi at all.

"Let's try to create a physical origin supernatural power first!"

Ye Tian planned.

It was also extremely difficult to create a physical body origin supernatural power, and Ye Tian didn't even have any clue.

Although the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had also mentioned to him the matter of creating the Origin Divine Power before, he could only give him some advice, and could not really help him.

According to the proposal of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, he could first cultivate some flesh-like Chaos Divine Powers, and when he had accumulated enough experience, he could try to create Chaos Divine Powers!

That's right, it's the creation of Chaos Magical Powers!

The Chaos Divine Powers in Chaos are basically created by True Ancestors, while the powerful Chaos Divine Powers are created by Dao Ancestors.

Ye Tian can't create a powerful Chaos Divine Power, but as long as he creates a Chaos Divine Power, after all, he doesn't want to create an Origin Divine Power that defies the sky, and it won't take enough time to spend a lifetime!

Next, Ye Tian began to collect the physical body type Chaos Divine Power, no matter what the power was, all of them.

He even used the Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch to exchange some flesh-like chaos supernatural powers from the Yang Heavenly Palace.

In just a few days, Ye Tian collected more than twenty flesh-like Chaos Divine Powers, and then began to cultivate them one by one.

At the beginning, it would take him at least a thousand years to cultivate a flesh-like chaos supernatural power, but the flesh-like chaotic supernatural powers all had something in common, and when Ye Tian understood enough, it wouldn't take long to comprehend a flesh-like chaotic supernatural power.

In the future, he can even practice a flesh-like chaos supernatural power in ten years.

Subsequently, he cultivated these chaotic supernatural powers one by one to the extreme level.

Gradually, Ye Tian's Extreme Chaos Divine Power became more and more, and the length and width of the prototype of the Great Dao became longer and wider.

The prototype of the Great Dao became stronger, and Ye Tian's strength naturally became stronger.

10 million years!

20 million years!

......

Ye Tian's retreat time was very long, and the big universe gradually lost news of Ye Tian, and few people discussed it, and he was even about to become a legend of the younger generation.

But everyone knows that Ye Tian is still the number one on the Heavenly Monarch List, and no one can surpass him.

In a flash, 100 million years have passed.

A lot of things have happened in the big universe, such as the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden of the God of War Tower has achieved the combat power of the nine-star peak god general, and has broken through to the realm of the Mandate of Heaven, and as soon as she enters the realm of the Mandate of Heaven, she has advanced by leaps and bounds, obviously with enough resources, and her strength has improved extremely fast.

Now, the strength of the Yunzi Divine Maiden is gradually approaching the ranks of the Heavenly Monarchs.

Compared with Ye Tian, this kind of progress is naturally very slow and slow, but compared to other Heavenly Monarchs, he is a real demon Tianjiao.

The major forces have given birth to some powerful Heavenly Monarchs, and the Yunzi Divine Maiden is only one of the more representative ones.

And the native natives of the great universe have also given birth to many geniuses, such as the human race, which gave birth to a Tianjiao, named Taihao Divine General.

In just 10 million years, he has reached the level of a six-star god general, and he is still improving, and he is also a Tianjiao who is expected to be transcendent.

Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu have also risen in cultivation now, and they have reached the peak of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and they are only one step away from condensing the true spirit, and the Heavenly Monarchs of the human race have also been born a lot, with hundreds of them, most of them have joined the Void Heaven Palace.

Void Heaven Temple.

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch and others have all broken through to the half-step True Spirit Realm, among which Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch has even fused his physical body and true spirit by as much as sixty percent under sufficient resources, and his strength is far from comparable to before.

But Ye Tian is still a Heavenly Monarch, which makes them very curious.

this day.

Swallowing Moon Tianjun and Peng Yu Tianjun were chatting.

"Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, do you know why Zi has always been in the Heavenly Monarch, the last time I saw him, he had already reached the extreme of the Heavenly Monarch, and his multiple Chaos Divine Powers had also reached the limit level, why did he still stay among the Heavenly Monarchs?"

"I don't know!" Swallowing Moon Heavenly Monarch shook his head, "Maybe it's for a stronger foundation, that Tianjiao is not an existence that we can imagine." "

"Could it have something to do with the curse?"

Peng Yu Tianjun asked.

"Curse?" Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch frowned, "You mean the curse that Zero gave to the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the Zero Curse Ten Thousand Laws Daozi will never be able to advance to the True Spirit Realm, but didn't the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son ask the Dao Ancestor for advice?"

"I asked Dao Ancestor for advice, but Dao Ancestor is no longer in the Great Universe, and he can't enter the Great Universe, so he may not be able to help Wanfa Daozi break the curse!"

"This kind of thing is not something we are worried about, with the talent of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, if the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son really can't break the curse, the Dao Ancestor will not care, we don't understand the situation, don't comment on it!"

"Okay!"

Peng Yu Tianjun nodded.

this day.

There is news from the Giant Axe City that the Mad True Monarch has completed the fusion of the physical body and the true spirit, completely stepped into the realm of the true spirit, and has become a true true monarch.

Although he was known as the True Monarch before, he was just a pseudo-True Monarch, and when he stepped into the realm of True Spirits, he was the real True Monarch.

As soon as he entered the True Monarch, the strength of the Mad True Monarch skyrocketed many times, and he was definitely the strongest person in the Great Universe.

Moreover, a new list has also appeared on the Great Universe Ancestral Monument - the True Monarch List.

However, there is only one Mad True Monarch on the True Monarch list.

The other half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses saw that there was only one person on the True Spirit List, and they all cultivated frantically, and they all wanted to be promoted to the True Spirit Realm, but this step was not easy.

Now that the shackles of the Great Universe's half-step True Spirit and True Spirit Realm have been loosened, it is still very difficult to break through, more than ten times more difficult than Chaos.

Mad Zhenjun was able to break through because of his high talent, abundant resources, and great perseverance.

If others want to break through, it won't be easy.

However, after a few million, the Wanfeng True Monarch of the Chaos Trading House successfully broke the shackles and was promoted to the True Spirit Realm, becoming the second True Monarch on the True Monarch List.

In the following years, one by one, half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouses broke through and stepped into the True Spirit Realm one after another.

This era has become a battlefield and era where the true monarch and the strong fight each other, and a true monarch is famous in the universe.

And Wanfa Daozi, who was previously known as the strongest man, gradually disappeared from people's sight, and even didn't attract much attention.

Some people even thought that Ye Tian's potential had been consumed a lot, and his progress had become slow, almost the same as that of other ordinary Dao Ancestors.

Indeed, Ye Tian's previous progress was too scary, and now this is normal.

Fortunately, they didn't know that Ye Tian had fallen under the spell of the demon's ban, otherwise there would be countless people mocking it day and night.

------------

"The prototype of the avenue, 50,000 meters long and 20,000 meters wide, my avenue prototype has grown too fast, and my current strength is much stronger than before!"

Ye Tian sighed.

After so many years of retreat, he not only cultivated many flesh-type chaos supernatural powers to the extreme level, but also browsed countless classics and created a physical-type chaotic supernatural powers.

At the beginning, the Chaos Divine Power he created was very rubbish, and it belonged to the most rubbish Chaos Divine Power in Chaos.

But gradually, the physical Chaos Divine Power he created began to be good, but it was still relatively bad from the level of three thousand Chaos Divine Powers.

He will not be disappointed, the chaos supernatural powers that can be ranked on the list of three thousand chaotic supernatural powers are basically created by some invincible true ancestors and even Dao ancestors, and the chaotic supernatural powers created by ordinary true ancestors cannot enter the three thousand chaotic supernatural power list.

With the creation of a Chaos Divine Power by him, his background is beyond the imagination of others.

After accumulating enough foundation, he finally had the qualifications to create the Origin Divine Power.

After a long period of speculation, he was finally ready to try to create a flesh-like origin supernatural power.

"Let's start, my plan is to create a flesh-like origin supernatural power in 100 million years, regardless of the power, as long as it can be created, it will be a success!"

Ye Tian muttered.
